item.title: software architecture
item.description: Xin chào m.n 👋 💬 Ask me about: https://fb.com/biccv [ Design Large System ] - Review Usecase - Design Interface - Design Business - Design Database [ Software Architecture ] - Performance - Scalability - Reliability - Security - Development - Technology Stack [ Performance ] - Testing
